title: Welcome to JPIC — A New Chapter Begins
excerpt: St. John Paul II International College warmly welcomes our new and returning students for the 2025 academic year. This milestone year marks a decade of Cambridge excellence at JPIC.
body:
Dear Students, Parents and Staff,

We are delighted to welcome everyone back to St. John Paul II International College for an exciting new academic year. As we celebrate our 10th anniversary, we look forward to continued excellence in Cambridge education, faith formation, and holistic development.

This year promises to be a landmark year for our school community. New programmes, new opportunities, and the same unwavering commitment to Truth · Wisdom · Love that has defined JPIC since 2015.

We look forward to a wonderful year together.
